description: Common SQL datasource fields shared by the grafana SQL engine (`sqleng`) used by grafana-postgresql-datasource, grafana-mysql-datasource, and grafana-mssql-datasource. Fields mirror the shared `sqleng.JsonData` struct (see `pkg/postgresql/sqleng/sql_engine.go`, `pkg/mysql/sqleng/sql_engine.go`, and `pkg/tsdb/mssql/sqleng/sql_engine.go` in grafana/grafana) plus the root-level `url`/`user` and secure `password`/TLS certificate fields rendered by each plugin's `ConfigurationEditor.tsx`. Vendor-specific options (postgres `sslmode`/`timescaledb`/`postgresVersion`, mysql `tlsAuth`/`tlsAuthWithCACert`/`allowCleartextPasswords`/`timezone`, mssql `encrypt`/`serverName`/`authenticationType`/Kerberos/Azure auth) intentionally stay out of this pack and remain in the individual plugin schemas.

fields.label: Host URL
fields.description: Host and port of the SQL server, e.g. `localhost:5432` (Postgres), `localhost:3306` (MySQL), or `localhost:1433` (MSSQL).

fields.label: Username
fields.description: Database user the plugin connects as. Stored on the datasource at the root level (`user`), not inside `jsonData`.

fields.label: Password
fields.description: Database password, persisted encrypted in `secureJsonData.password`.

fields.label: Database name
fields.description: Name of the database to connect to. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.Database`.

fields.label: Min time interval
fields.description: Lower limit for the auto group-by time interval. Recommended to match the write frequency of your data (for example `1m`). Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.TimeInterval`.

fields.label: Connection timeout
fields.description: Number of seconds to wait before canceling the request when connecting to the database. `0` means no timeout. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.ConnectionTimeout`.

fields.label: Max open connections
fields.description: Maximum number of open connections to the database. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.MaxOpenConns`.

fields.label: Max idle connections
fields.description: Maximum number of idle connections in the pool. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.MaxIdleConns`.

fields.label: Connection max lifetime
fields.description: Maximum amount of time (in seconds) a connection may be reused. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.ConnMaxLifetime`.

fields.label: Skip TLS verification
fields.description: Skip verification of the SQL server's TLS certificate chain and host name. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.TlsSkipVerify`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL method
fields.description: Determines how TLS/SSL certificates are configured. `file-path` references certificates on the local file system; `file-content` stores the certificate bytes encrypted in `secureJsonData` and writes them to disk on connect. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.ConfigurationMethod`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL root certificate file
fields.description: Path to the PEM-encoded root certificate file used to verify the server's certificate. Used when `tlsConfigurationMethod` is `file-path`. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.RootCertFile`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL client certificate file
fields.description: Path to the PEM-encoded client certificate file. Used when `tlsConfigurationMethod` is `file-path`. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.CertFile`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL client key file
fields.description: Path to the PEM-encoded client key file. Used when `tlsConfigurationMethod` is `file-path`. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.CertKeyFile`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL server name
fields.description: Server name used for TLS SNI / certificate verification. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.Servername` (lowercase `servername` JSON tag) in postgres and mysql. Distinct from `plugin_sdk_settings.serverName` (camelCase, HTTP TLS SNI). mssql uses a different storage key (`serverName`, camelCase) and should exclude this field via `baseFields[].exclude` and declare its own.

fields.label: TLS/SSL root certificate (content)
fields.description: PEM-encoded root CA certificate, stored encrypted in `secureJsonData.tlsCACert`. Used when `tlsConfigurationMethod` is `file-content`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL client certificate (content)
fields.description: PEM-encoded client certificate, stored encrypted in `secureJsonData.tlsClientCert`. Used when `tlsConfigurationMethod` is `file-content`.

fields.label: TLS/SSL client key (content)
fields.description: PEM-encoded client private key, stored encrypted in `secureJsonData.tlsClientKey`. Used when `tlsConfigurationMethod` is `file-content`.

fields.label: Enable Secure Socks Proxy
fields.description: Route the SQL connection through Grafana's Secure Socks Proxy. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.SecureDSProxy`.

fields.label: Secure Socks Proxy username
fields.description: Username forwarded to the Secure Socks Proxy. Corresponds to `sqleng.JsonData.SecureDSProxyUsername`.
